'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 43''' was the forty-third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 23]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]
*[[The Force/Legends|The Force]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Power generator/Legends|Power Generator]] Area
*[[ASN-121/Legends|ASN-121 Assassin Droid]]
*[[Battle droid/Legends|Military Droids]]
*[[ISD-72x deflector shield generator dome|Energy Shields]]
*[[Air taxi/Legends|Coruscant Air Taxi]]
